div.h2: Data Flow: SHA-256 Compress Output → HMAC-SHA-256 Extension

div.p: Why reset prevents length-extension: Without reset, outer_ctx.H would equal inner_ctx's final state. An attacker knowing inner_hash could resume outer_ctx, appending arbitrary data to produce a valid MAC without knowing K_opad. Reset forces outer_ctx.H = INITIAL_HASH, so the attacker must know K_opad (= k_block ⊕ 0x5C) to produce any valid outer hash output.
